commands.description: If nonzero, bots may use pistols.

commands.description: If nonzero, bots may use rifles.

commands.name: bot_autodifficulty_threshold_low
commands.description: Lower bound below Average Human Contribution Score that a bot must be below to change its difficulty

commands.description: 0 = Use old bot chatter system, 1 = Use response rules

commands.description: Determines whether bots can be controlled by players

commands.description: For internal testing purposes.

commands.description: For internal testing purposes.

commands.name: bot_eco_limit
commands.description: If nonzero, bots will not buy if their money falls below this amount.

commands.name: bot_flipout

commands.description: If nonzero, bots wait until a player joins before entering the game.

commands.name: bot_join_in_warmup

commands.name: cl_clock_buffer_ticks
commands.description: Clock sync will try to maintain an additional margin of N ticks. This is intended to smooth over packet loss, and is a replacement for cl_interp_ratio / cl_interp. This value is simply added to cl_clock_recvmargin_desired

commands.name: cl_clock_correction
commands.description: Enable/disable clock correction on the client.

commands.name: cl_clock_recvmargin_adjust_limit_slowdown
commands.description: Clock sync will not slow down time slower than N%

commands.name: cl_clock_recvmargin_adjust_limit_speedup
commands.description: Clock sync will not speed up time faster than N%

commands.name: cl_clock_recvmargin_desired
commands.description: Clock sync will try to maintain N ms margin between tick arrival and polling network. The effective value is the sum of this and the time implied by cl_clock_buffer_ticks

commands.name: cl_clock_recvmargin_minsamples_slowdown
commands.description: Clock sync will not slow down unless we have N indicating samples

commands.name: cl_clock_recvmargin_minsamples_speedup

commands.name: cl_clock_recvmargin_timeconstant_slowdown

commands.name: cl_clock_recvmargin_timeconstant_speedup
commands.description: Clock sync will remove 63.2% of the error in N seconds

commands.name: cl_clock_recvmargin_window
commands.description: Clock sync will use past N seconds

commands.name: cl_clockdrift_max_ticks

commands.name: mp_damage_vampiric_amount
commands.description: If Set to non-0, will determine the fraction of damage dealt that will be given to attacker.

commands.name: mp_death_drop_c4

commands.name: mp_death_drop_defuser

commands.name: mp_death_drop_gun
commands.description: Which gun to drop on player death: 0=none, 1=best, 2=current or best

commands.name: mp_death_drop_healthshot
commands.description: Drop healthshot on player death

commands.name: mp_death_drop_taser
commands.description: Drop taser on player death

commands.name: mp_deathcam_skippable

commands.name: mp_disable_autokick

commands.name: mp_disconnect_kills_players

commands.name: mp_display_kill_assists
commands.description: Whether to display and score player assists

commands.name: mp_dm_bonus_length_max

commands.name: mp_dm_bonus_length_min
commands.description: Minimum time the bonus time will last (in seconds)

commands.name: mp_dm_time_between_bonus_min

commands.name: mp_drop_grenade_enable

commands.name: mp_drop_knife_enable

commands.name: mp_equipment_reset_rounds

commands.name: mp_fadetoblack

commands.name: mp_flinch_punch_scale

commands.name: mp_force_pick_time

commands.name: mp_forcecamera

commands.name: mp_free_armor

commands.name: mp_freezetime

commands.name: mp_friendlyfire

commands.name: mp_give_player_c4

commands.name: mp_global_damage_per_second

commands.name: mp_guardian_bomb_plant_custom_x_mark_location

commands.name: mp_guardian_force_collect_hostages_timeout
commands.description: Force bots to collect hostages after this amount of time if no enemy has been seen.

commands.name: mp_guardian_target_site
commands.description: If set to the index of a bombsite, will cause random spawns to be only created near that site.

commands.name: mp_halftime
commands.description: Determines whether the match switches sides in a halftime event.

commands.name: mp_halftime_duration
commands.description: Target number of seconds that halftime lasts; shortened if team intros are active

commands.name: mp_halftime_pausetimer

commands.name: mp_heavyassaultsuit_aimpunch

commands.name: mp_hostages_takedamage

commands.name: mp_round_restart_delay

commands.name: mp_teamcashawards

commands.name: mp_teamlogo_2
commands.description: Enter a team's shorthand image name to display their logo. Images can be found here: 'resource/flash/econ/tournaments/teams'

commands.name: mp_teammatchstat_2

commands.name: mp_warmup_online_enabled

commands.name: phys_reload_immediately
commands.description: Set to 1 to reload resources and reconstruct physics of entities on the fly. May unexpectedly change behavior or crash the game, because game code is generally unaware of underlying resource reloads and may hold references to physics that may become invalid during resource reload. It is inherently harder for physics to deal with resource reloads because of persistent nature of objects being simulated (textures can be easily reloaded on the fly; if an entity holds a handle to a ragdoll body part, it may expect that handle to stay valid while the ragdoll exists)

commands.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_attempt_window
commands.description: The length of the window of trailing counter-strafe attempts considered during input automation detection.

commands.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_kick
commands.description: Whether or not to kick players when counter-strafe input automation is detected.

commands.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_logging
commands.description: 0: never, 1: every time counter-strafe input automation is detected, 2: every counter-strafe

commands.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_lower_overlap_pct_threshold
commands.description: The percentage of overlapping attempts in the attempt window below which input automation detection is triggered at the success threshold.

commands.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_min_attempts
commands.description: The minimum number of counter-strafe attempts required for input automation detection. The player must be moving more than 135.2 units/s for their counter-strafe to be considered an attempt. An attempt is either considered a success (counter-strafing took place within a single tick), an overlap (both directions were held for 1+ ticks) or an underlap (neither direction was held for 1+ ticks).

commands.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_sequence_length
commands.description: The length of sequential counter-strafe attempts evaluated relative to the success threshold. Input automation detection considers the best sequence within the larger attempt window.

commands.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_success_threshold
commands.description: The minimum number of successful counter-strafes within a best sequence that will trigger input automation detection. The number of successes that trigger input automation detection is interpolated between the success threshold and a 'perfect' sequence (all counter-strafes in a sequence are successes), depending on the player's percentage of overlapping counter-strafe attempts.

commands.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_upper_overlap_pct_threshold
commands.description: The percentage of overlapping attempts in the attempt window below which input automation detection is triggered when all counter-strafes in a sequence are successes.

commands.name: sv_auto_full_alltalk_during_warmup_half_end
commands.description: When enabled will automatically turn on full all talk mode in warmup, at halftime and at the end of the match

commands.description: Use a constraint to keep C4 pointed upright when thrown

commands.name: sv_c4_upright_constraint_strength

commands.name: sv_cheats
commands.description: Allow cheats on server

commands.name: sv_client_max_interp_ratio
commands.description: This can be used to limit the value of cl_interp_ratio for connected clients (only while they are connected).

commands.name: sv_client_min_interp_ratio
commands.description: This can be used to limit the value of cl_interp_ratio for connected clients (only while they are connected).

commands.name: sv_clientrates
commands.description: Show client rates.

commands.name: sv_clockcorrection_msecs
commands.description: The server tries to keep each player's m_nTickBase withing this many msecs of the server absolute tickcount

commands.name: sv_cluster
commands.description: Data center cluster this server lives in.

commands.name: sv_coaching_enabled
commands.description: Allows spectating and communicating with a team ( 'coach t' or 'coach ct' )

commands.name: sv_competitive_minspec

commands.name: sv_compute_per_bot_difficulty
commands.description: 0 = compute all bot difficulties equally, 1 = compute unique bot difficulty for each bot

commands.name: sv_cq_min_queue

commands.description: When trimming a bloated CQ, leave at least N more commands than the minimum

commands.name: sv_cq_trim_bloat_space
commands.description: When trimming a bloated CQ, try to leave room for N more commands to be added. 0 will trim only what is needed to remove the immediate bloat, a very large value will reset the whole queue.

commands.name: sv_cq_trim_catchup_remainder
commands.description: When trimming an overful CQ due to app 'catchup' request, leave at least N more commands than the minimum

commands.name: sv_cs_dump_econ_item_stringtable
commands.description: sv_cs_dump_econ_item_stringtable

commands.name: sv_deadtalk

commands.name: sv_debug_overlays_bandwidth
commands.description: Broadcast server debug overlays traffic

commands.name: sv_debug_overlays_broadcast
commands.description: Broadcast server debug overlays

commands.description: Visualizes +use logic. Green cross=trace success, Red cross=trace too far, Green box=radius success

commands.name: sv_deltaticks_enforce
commands.description: By default, player must ack delta ticks in order. How to enforce it: 2 = kick all clients, 1 = kick only TV clients, 0 = do not kick.

commands.name: sv_deltaticks_log
commands.description: Whether diagnostic logging is enabled when clients ack delta ticks out of order. Policy: 2 = log all out of order acks, 1 = log only when disconnect is triggered, 0 = do not log.

commands.name: sv_dev_damage_use_netvars

commands.name: sv_dev_entitydeltapadding_extra_min
commands.description: When encoding entity deltas, append on a random number of extra bytes. This happens after sv_dev_entitydeltapadding_min_size.

commands.name: sv_dev_entitydeltapadding_min_size
commands.description: When encoding entity deltas, if the delta size is < N bytes, then shove in N dummy bytes. This happens before sv_dev_entitydeltapadding_extra_min/sv_dev_entitydeltapadding_extra_max

commands.name: sv_dev_simulate_gcdown

commands.description: When encoding entity deltas, instead of unreliably deducing explicit deletions, actually send list of existing but not networked entities (dont_transmit list) to each client.

Set to 2 to spew any changes merged in by this fix.
